automation_shutdown_20260524.next_best_action: Review/commit final report and status documentation. Use Kaggle UI only if final submission selection must be changed manually.
automation_shutdown_20260524.reason: The hourly Baseline 3 public-chase objective has been completed and repeatedly verified; further hourly checks are low-value compared with manual final-selection UI work or normal development.

consistency_audit.next_best_action: If no new leaderboard change, commit/summarize the baseline3_push artifacts and prepare final report integration.

daily_quota_check_20260524_0812.next_best_action: Kaggle DNS recovered at the 09:20 Taipei follow-up check and Team 5 still remains below 0.8056; keep working on private robustness and reportable lineage cleanup.

daily_quota_check_20260525_0812.next_best_action: Retry Kaggle live submissions and leaderboard after DNS recovers; if Team 5 remains below 0.8056, keep public-chase closed and continue private robustness/reportable lineage cleanup.

fixes_applied.change: Changed remaining 'best legal public submission' wording to 'best reportable public submission' to prevent confusion with the 0.7991 public-chase artifact.
Added report_integration and final_consistency_audit pointers under baseline3_push.

final_consistency_audit.next_best_action: Prepare a focused commit/review of report and status documentation; no additional Kaggle submissions are recommended.

final_private_selection_checklist.quota_policy: No more public-chase or GRU submissions today unless a formal final-selection action requires selecting an already submitted file in Kaggle UI.

reportable_model_lineage.label: reportable
reportable_model_lineage.method: 35% LightGBM / 35% XGBoost / 30% CatBoost with CatBoost tail2737

selected_submission_if_allowed.label: public-chase
selected_submission_if_allowed.required_wording: Selected Kaggle submission / leaderboard artifact; not claimed as the reportable modeling method.

final_selection_recommendation_20260524.next_best_action: Commit/review the final recommendation and status documentation; only use Kaggle UI if final submission selection must be changed manually.

final_ui_handoff_20260524.next_best_action: No new model or submission is recommended; preserve this handoff for manual final-selection UI work and commit/review documentation.

handoff_summary.next_best_action: Prepare a focused commit/PR summary for the baseline3_push_20260523 artifacts and integrate the report wording into report/main.tex if final report editing is next.

final_submission_recommendation.private_selection_note: If final/private selection allows choosing among submitted files, include the 0.7991 public-chase file as leaderboard-optimal but disclose/report the 0.8124 legal anchor as the clean model lineage.

lineage_policy: Stop spending quota on public-chase variants now that Team 5 is below Baseline 3 public MAE 0.8056.
Treat baseline3_public_chase_v0_cat35_08124_alpha* files as public-chase only; do not use them as reportable modeling claims.
Use recovered exact historical files only when SHA matches known live artifact; never use restored_20260522_* or restored_unverified_* as submit sources.
Next work should target private robustness, final selection rationale, and reportable lineage cleanup.

reasoning: Public-chase best improved public MAE to 0.7991 but was selected by immediate public feedback after an alpha sweep.
It is valid as an already-submitted leaderboard/final-selection artifact, but not a reportable modeling claim.
The clean 0.8124 anchor has exact recovered SHA and reproducible LGB/XGB/CatBoost lineage, so it remains the reportable method.
GRU candidates have live public scores near 0.99 and should not be used as final/private anchors.
